description: A single-page informational website introducing the red panda (Ailurus fulgens) with engaging content, visuals, and a clean, responsive design.

files.purpose: Python dependency list for FastAPI backend
FastAPI application entry point serving static files
Data model definitions for static content
Business logic and data services for static content
API route definitions for static content
Package.json for Next.js app with minimal dependencies
Main page component for red panda introduction website
Root layout component with metadata and global styles
Global CSS styles for the red panda website
Next.js configuration for image optimization and static export
Primary red panda image for hero section
Secondary red panda image for facts section
Tertiary red panda image for conservation section
Integration report documenting how all components work together
Manifest of all delivered files and their purposes

run_instructions.backend: cd workspace/backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && uvicorn app.main:app --reload
run_instructions.frontend: cd workspace/frontend && npm install && npm run dev
run_instructions.static_export: cd workspace/frontend && npm run build && npm run export
